content_en:
As for the ~“Iddah from the second husband, it is a controversial point among scholars. If the second husband knows that his marriage with her is forbidden, the sound opinion is that there should be an ~“Iddah. If he thinks that such marriage is valid, there must be an ~Iddah from him.

A man promised his wife to divorce her, but he had the intention to resume marriage with her and conclude a new marriage contract with another dowry, is this valid?

Q: A man said to his wife: I do not want you. Go to your family. I am going to divorce you. He really intended to divorce her. Is it valid to resume marriage with her and conclude a new marriage contract with another dowry?

A: The promise to divorce is not effected and it is neither obligatory nor desirable to fulfill it. If he really divorced her and by saying “Go to your family”, he meant divorce, she is once divorced unless he intended more. He has the right to resume marriage with her during her waiting period even without her consent, her custodian or dowry. Allah knows best.

Is it permissible for a man to divorce his wife just because his mother hates her?

Q: A woman hates the wife of her son although she has given birth to children. The husband’s mother advises him to divorce her. Is it allowed for him to do so?

When a man thrice divorces his wife unintentionally and he means just once, is it effected?

Q: A man quarreled with his wife and he wanted to divorce her once, but he erred and he divorced her thrice. What is the legal judgment?

A: All praise be to Allah. If he erred and divorced her thrice while he intends just once, only one divorce is effected. Even if he erred and intended to say another word instead of divorce but he said it unintentionally, no divorce is effected. Allah knows best.

A man is indebted to his wife and he wanted to divorce her if he did not pay his debt. If she acquitted him from such debt, is divorce effected?

Q: A man was indebted to his wife who said to him: I am afraid that you may not pay me back. He replied: If I have not settled such debt by the end of Ramadan, you are thrice divorced. The husband is now absent in Qus and he did not appoint an agent to act on behalf of him. If the wife acquitted him, is divorce effected?

A: If she acquitted him, he should not divorce her according to many jurists such as Abu Hanifah, Muhammad, Ahmed and others. If she acquitted him, there is no debt to be settled. The same thing applies when a man pays the debt on behalf of another as the lender obtained his money.

The Prophet (peace be upon him) said to a woman: “If there had been a debt on your mother (or father), would you have paid it? She replied: Yes. The Prophet said: Allah’s rights are better fulfilled.

Is it permissible for a man to re-marry his exwife whom he divorced thrice before consummating marriage with her?

Q: Is it permissible for a man to re-marry his virgin exwife -whom he divorced thrice before consummating marriage with her?

A: All praise be to Allah. Divorcing a woman thrice before or after consummating marriage makes her illegal for the husband until she married another who, in turn, divorced her. This is the opinion held by the four juristic schools.

A woman is divorced thrice before consummating marriage and when she gets 201

the new wife hated the old one, she has the right to divorce her on his behalf. The term of this authorization letter is ten years. Later, he divorced the authorized woman. Is such authorization valid? Will it be invalid because the authorized woman is divorced?

A: All praise be to Allah. Some may think that this question is related to authorization depending on the fact that if a husband authorized his wife in a sale contract, for example, and later he thrice divorced her, such authorization is not valid as mentioned by jurists. The case here is different.

This authorization letter is invalid once he divorced her, because he did not intend to divorce his first wife. The man’s intention was to make the second wife have full freedom in divorcing the first. He means that if the second wife did not want another wife to live with her husband, she has the right to divorce her. Once the authorized woman is divorced, she has no right to use such authorization letter. The husband made such letter just to please his second wife and now she is thrice divorced. It is now meaningless.

As for stipulating certain conditions in the marriage contract such as not to make polygamy, some scholars believe that such conditions are valid. If the husband breached the condition and married another, the wife has the right to terminate the contract. This is a more expressive case than our case here in which he authorized the new wife to divorce the old one once she hated her. In both cases, the authorized woman has the right to act

according to the contract or letter when there is already another wife. According to Abu Hanifah and Shafi*1, such conditions are invalid.

The authorization letter is permissible according to the unanimous agreement of Muslim scholars and the authorizer has the right to terminate it. If one said to his wife: “You are free to divorce yourself”, this is a controversial point among scholars. According to Ahmed and Shafi*I, it is just an authorization and the husband has the right to terminate it before she uses it. On the other hand, according to Abu Hanifah and Malik, the man does not have the right to terminate it.

According to Ahmed, Malik and other scholars, if the man stipulates that if he married another wife, she would have the right to be divorced so long as she is his wife. Once he divorced her, she does not have any right to such stipulation. Allah knows best.

When a man’s authorized agent thrice divorces his (the man’s) wife, is it permissible for the husband to return to his wife?

Q: A quarrel occurred between a man and his wife. He was about to travel and he said to his agent: If she is content with this sum of money as her expenses, hand it over to her. If she is discontent, divorce her. After the

general permission to get out, it is permissible for her to get out. Allah knows best.

A man accused his wife of stealing a sum of money and said to her: If you did not bring this money, you are divorced. Is divorce effected?

Q: A man accused his wife of stealing a sum of money. She said: I swear by Allah that I have not stolen it. He said: If you did not bring this money, you are thrice divorced. What about the status of the wife?

A: If it turns out that she did not steal the money, she is not to be divorced according to the soundest opinion held by scholars. The husband means that she is divorced only if she had taken the money. Allah knows best.

When the husband says to his wife: “you are divorced if you give birth to a female baby”, and he revoked his threat. The woman gave birth to a female baby. Is divorce effected?

Q: While his wife is pregnant, the husband said to her: “you are divorced if you give birth to a female baby”. Before giving birth, he revoked his threat. Later the woman gave birth to a female baby. Is divorce effected?

A: If he divorced her irrevocably or he left her until her “Iddah (waiting period) comes to an end, there are two famous opinions held by scholars in this regard. Imam Shafi! also held two opinions in this regard; one of them is that divorce is effected, and this is the opinion of Ahmed as well. If he did not revoke his divorce and returned to her during the waiting period, the marriage contract is still valid. Divorce is effected if he left the matter pending (i.e. he still stipulates the condition mentioned in the question.)

During a quarrel with his wife, the husband said: if you say “divorce me”, I will do, but she kept silent. What is the legal ruling on this matter?

Q: A man quarreled with his wife and he was hurt. Accordingly, he said: if you say “divorce me”, you are thrice divorced, but she kept silent. Then she said to her mother: what does he say? Her mother told her his words. The wife said: Divorce me. Is divorced once or thrice effected?

An angry man swore an oath of thrice divorce that his pregnant wife should not enter her aunt’s house. After giving birth, she entered this house. Is divorce effected?

Q: An angry man swore an oath of thrice divorce that his pregnant wife should not enter her aunt’s house. After giving birth to a baby, she entered this house. The man once said to other people: If my wife entered her aunt’s house after giving birth, she is not to be blamed. Is divorce effected?

A: If the man intends that once his wife gave birth to a child, he is not to be blamed for his oath and that his wife is free to enter her aunt’s house, divorce is not effected. Yet his oath is still effective and if his wife entered her aunt’s house while she is pregnant, divorce is effected. Allah knows best.

Before his travel, a husband swore an oath of divorce that his wife should not get out of the house during his absence, but out of necessity, she went out. Is divorce effected? 212

Q: Before his travel, a husband said to his wife: If you get out of the house during my absence, you are divorced. After his arrival, she said to him: There was necessity and I was obliged to get out. Is divorce effected?

A: If she believes that such necessity is not included in his oath and that she does not act in disconformity with his oath when she gets out, divorce is not effected.

When a pregnant woman refuses to have intercourse with her husband and he swore an oath of divorce that he will not have intercourse with her after giving birth. What is the legal judgement if he had intercourse with her after giving birth?

Q: A pregnant woman refused to have intercourse with her husband who was hurt because of such refusal and swore an oath of divorce that he will not have intercourse with her after giving birth. Is divorce effected if he had intercourse with her after giving birth? Is the reason for such an oath taken into consideration?
content_id:
Adapun 'iddah dari suami kedua, ini merupakan perkara yang diperselisihkan di kalangan ulama. Jika suami kedua mengetahui bahwa pernikahannya dengannya adalah haram, pendapat yang sahih adalah bahwa harus ada 'iddah. Jika ia mengira pernikahan tersebut sah, maka harus ada 'iddah darinya.

Seorang laki-laki berjanji kepada istrinya untuk menceraikannya, namun ia berniat untuk kembali kepadanya dan membuat akad nikah baru dengan mahar baru, apakah ini sah?

Q: Seorang laki-laki berkata kepada istrinya: Aku tidak menginginkanmu. Pergilah ke keluargamu. Aku akan menceraikanmu. Ia benar-benar berniat untuk menceraikannya. Apakah sah untuk kembali kepadanya dan membuat akad nikah baru dengan mahar baru?

A: Janji untuk menceraikan tidak berlaku dan tidak wajib maupun tidak dianjurkan untuk memenuhinya. Jika ia benar-benar menceraikannya dan dengan ucapan "Pergilah ke keluargamu" ia bermaksud talak, maka ia jatuh talak satu kecuali jika ia bermaksud lebih. Ia berhak untuk rujuk kepadanya selama masa 'iddahnya bahkan tanpa persetujuannya, walinya, atau mahar. Wallahu a'lam.

Apakah diperbolehkan bagi seorang laki-laki untuk menceraikan istrinya hanya karena ibunya membencinya?

Q: Seorang perempuan membenci istri anaknya meskipun ia telah melahirkan anak-anak. Ibu suami menyarankannya untuk menceraikannya. Apakah dibolehkan baginya untuk melakukannya?

Ketika seorang laki-laki menceraikan istrinya tiga kali tanpa sengaja dan ia hanya bermaksud sekali, apakah itu berlaku?

Q: Seorang laki-laki bertengkar dengan istrinya dan ia ingin menceraikannya sekali, tetapi ia keliru dan menceraikannya tiga kali. Apa hukumnya?

A: Segala puji bagi Allah. Jika ia keliru dan menceraikannya tiga kali sementara ia hanya berniat sekali, maka hanya satu talak yang berlaku. Bahkan jika ia keliru dan bermaksud mengucapkan kata lain selain talak namun mengucapkannya tanpa sengaja, maka tidak ada talak yang berlaku. Wallahu a'lam.

Seorang laki-laki berhutang kepada istrinya dan ia ingin menceraikannya jika ia tidak membayar hutangnya. Jika ia membebaskannya dari hutang tersebut, apakah talak berlaku?

Q: Seorang laki-laki berhutang kepada istrinya yang berkata kepadanya: Aku khawatir kamu tidak akan membayarku kembali. Ia menjawab: Jika aku belum melunasi hutang tersebut pada akhir Ramadan, kamu jatuh talak tiga. Suami sekarang tidak ada di tempat di Qus dan ia tidak menunjuk wakil untuk bertindak atas namanya. Jika istri membebaskannya, apakah talak berlaku?

A: Jika ia membebaskannya, ia tidak seharusnya menceraikannya menurut banyak ulama seperti Abu Hanifah, Muhammad, Ahmad, dan lainnya. Jika ia membebaskannya, tidak ada hutang yang harus dilunasi. Hal yang sama berlaku ketika seseorang membayar hutang atas nama orang lain karena pemberi pinjaman telah mendapatkan uangnya kembali.

Nabi (shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam) berkata kepada seorang perempuan: "Seandainya ibumu (atau ayahmu) memiliki hutang, apakah kamu akan membayarnya? Ia menjawab: Ya. Nabi bersabda: Hak-hak Allah lebih layak untuk dipenuhi.

Apakah diperbolehkan bagi seorang laki-laki untuk menikahi kembali mantan istrinya yang ia talak tiga sebelum terjadi hubungan suami istri?

Q: Apakah diperbolehkan bagi seorang laki-laki untuk menikahi kembali mantan istrinya yang masih perawan — yang ia talak tiga sebelum terjadi hubungan suami istri?

A: Segala puji bagi Allah. Menceraikan seorang perempuan tiga kali sebelum atau setelah hubungan suami istri menjadikannya tidak halal bagi suami hingga ia menikah dengan orang lain yang kemudian menceraikannya. Ini adalah pendapat yang dipegang oleh keempat mazhab fiqh.

Seorang perempuan ditalak tiga sebelum hubungan suami istri dan ketika ia mendapatkan 201

istri baru membenci istri lama, ia berhak untuk menceraikannya atas namanya. Jangka waktu surat kuasa ini adalah sepuluh tahun. Kemudian, ia menceraikan perempuan yang diberi kuasa tersebut. Apakah kuasa tersebut sah? Apakah ia akan batal karena perempuan yang diberi kuasa diceraikan?

A: Segala puji bagi Allah. Sebagian orang mungkin berpikir bahwa pertanyaan ini berkaitan dengan pemberian kuasa berdasarkan fakta bahwa jika suami memberikan kuasa kepada istrinya dalam akad jual beli, misalnya, dan kemudian ia menceraikannya tiga kali, kuasa tersebut tidak sah sebagaimana disebutkan oleh para ulama fiqh. Kasusnya di sini berbeda.

Surat kuasa ini tidak berlaku begitu ia menceraikannya, karena ia tidak bermaksud menceraikan istri pertamanya. Niat laki-laki itu adalah memberi istri kedua kebebasan penuh dalam menceraikan istri pertama. Ia bermaksud bahwa jika istri kedua tidak ingin istri lain tinggal bersama suaminya, ia berhak untuk menceraikannya. Begitu perempuan yang diberi kuasa itu diceraikan, ia tidak berhak lagi menggunakan surat kuasa tersebut. Suami membuat surat itu hanya untuk menyenangkan istri keduanya dan sekarang ia telah ditalak tiga. Surat itu kini tidak berarti apa-apa.

Adapun penetapan syarat-syarat tertentu dalam akad nikah seperti tidak berpoligami, sebagian ulama berpendapat bahwa syarat-syarat tersebut sah. Jika suami melanggar syarat dan menikah dengan perempuan lain, istri berhak untuk mengakhiri akad. Ini adalah kasus yang lebih tegas daripada kasus kita di sini di mana ia memberi kuasa kepada istri baru untuk menceraikan istri lama jika ia membencinya. Dalam kedua kasus, perempuan yang diberi kuasa berhak untuk bertindak

sesuai dengan akad atau surat selama sudah ada istri lain. Menurut Abu Hanifah dan Syafi'i, syarat-syarat tersebut tidak sah.

Surat kuasa diperbolehkan berdasarkan kesepakatan para ulama Muslim dan pemberi kuasa berhak untuk mencabutnya. Jika seseorang berkata kepada istrinya: "Kamu bebas untuk menceraikan dirimu sendiri", ini merupakan perkara yang diperselisihkan di kalangan ulama. Menurut Ahmad dan Syafi'i, ini hanyalah sebuah kuasa dan suami berhak untuk mencabutnya sebelum ia menggunakannya. Di sisi lain, menurut Abu Hanifah dan Malik, laki-laki tidak berhak untuk mencabutnya.

Menurut Ahmad, Malik, dan ulama lainnya, jika laki-laki mensyaratkan bahwa jika ia menikah dengan perempuan lain, ia berhak untuk diceraikan selama ia masih menjadi istrinya. Begitu ia menceraikannya, ia tidak memiliki hak apa pun atas syarat tersebut. Wallahu a'lam.

Ketika wakil yang ditunjuk seorang laki-laki menceraikan istrinya tiga kali, apakah diperbolehkan bagi suami untuk kembali kepada istrinya?

Q: Terjadi pertengkaran antara seorang laki-laki dan istrinya. Ia hendak bepergian dan berkata kepada wakilnya: Jika ia puas dengan sejumlah uang ini sebagai nafkahnya, serahkan kepadanya. Jika ia tidak puas, ceraikan dia. Setelah

izin umum untuk keluar, diperbolehkan baginya untuk keluar. Wallahu a'lam.

Seorang laki-laki menuduh istrinya mencuri sejumlah uang dan berkata kepadanya: Jika kamu tidak membawa uang ini, kamu tertalak. Apakah talak berlaku?

Q: Seorang laki-laki menuduh istrinya mencuri sejumlah uang. Ia berkata: Aku bersumpah demi Allah bahwa aku tidak mencurinya. Ia berkata: Jika kamu tidak membawa uang ini, kamu jatuh talak tiga. Bagaimana status istri tersebut?

A: Jika ternyata ia tidak mencuri uang tersebut, ia tidak boleh diceraikan menurut pendapat paling sahih yang dipegang oleh para ulama. Suami bermaksud bahwa ia diceraikan hanya jika ia telah mengambil uang tersebut. Wallahu a'lam.

Ketika suami berkata kepada istrinya: "kamu tertalak jika kamu melahirkan bayi perempuan", dan ia mencabut ancamannya. Perempuan itu melahirkan bayi perempuan. Apakah talak berlaku?

Q: Ketika istrinya sedang hamil, suami berkata kepadanya: "kamu tertalak jika kamu melahirkan bayi perempuan". Sebelum melahirkan, ia mencabut ancamannya. Kemudian perempuan itu melahirkan bayi perempuan. Apakah talak berlaku?

A: Jika ia menceraikannya secara ba'in atau ia membiarkannya hingga masa 'iddahnya berakhir, ada dua pendapat terkenal yang dipegang oleh para ulama dalam hal ini. Imam Syafi'i juga memegang dua pendapat dalam hal ini; salah satunya adalah bahwa talak berlaku, dan ini juga merupakan pendapat Ahmad. Jika ia tidak mencabut talaknya dan kembali kepadanya selama masa 'iddah, akad nikah tetap sah. Talak berlaku jika ia membiarkan persoalan itu menggantung (yakni ia masih mensyaratkan kondisi yang disebutkan dalam pertanyaan.)

Saat bertengkar dengan istrinya, suami berkata: jika kamu mengucapkan "ceraikan aku", aku akan melakukannya, namun ia tetap diam. Apa hukum dalam perkara ini?

Q: Seorang laki-laki bertengkar dengan istrinya dan ia merasa tersakiti. Oleh karena itu, ia berkata: jika kamu mengucapkan "ceraikan aku", kamu jatuh talak tiga, namun ia tetap diam. Kemudian ia berkata kepada ibunya: Apa yang ia katakan? Ibunya memberitahunya ucapannya. Istri berkata: Ceraikan aku. Apakah talak satu atau tiga yang berlaku?

Seorang laki-laki yang marah bersumpah dengan talak tiga bahwa istrinya yang sedang hamil tidak boleh memasuki rumah bibinya. Setelah melahirkan, ia memasuki rumah tersebut. Apakah talak berlaku?

T: Seorang pria yang marah bersumpah dengan talak tiga bahwa istrinya yang sedang hamil tidak boleh memasuki rumah bibi istrinya. Setelah melahirkan, istri tersebut memasuki rumah itu. Sang pria pernah berkata kepada orang lain: Jika istriku memasuki rumah bibi istrinya setelah melahirkan, ia tidak boleh disalahkan. Apakah talak jatuh?

J: Jika sang pria bermaksud bahwa setelah istrinya melahirkan, ia tidak bertanggung jawab atas sumpahnya dan istrinya bebas memasuki rumah bibinya, maka talak tidak jatuh. Namun sumpahnya tetap berlaku, dan jika istrinya memasuki rumah bibinya dalam keadaan hamil, maka talak jatuh. Wallahu a'lam.

Sebelum bepergian, seorang suami bersumpah dengan talak bahwa istrinya tidak boleh keluar rumah selama kepergiannya, namun karena darurat, sang istri keluar. Apakah talak jatuh? 212

T: Sebelum bepergian, seorang suami berkata kepada istrinya: Jika kamu keluar rumah selama kepergianku, maka kamu tertalak. Setelah suami kembali, sang istri berkata kepadanya: Ada keadaan darurat dan aku terpaksa keluar. Apakah talak jatuh?

J: Jika sang istri meyakini bahwa keadaan darurat tersebut tidak termasuk dalam cakupan sumpah suaminya dan bahwa ia tidak melanggar sumpahnya ketika ia keluar, maka talak tidak jatuh.

Ketika seorang wanita hamil menolak berhubungan intim dengan suaminya, lalu suaminya bersumpah dengan talak bahwa ia tidak akan berhubungan intim dengannya setelah melahirkan. Apa hukumnya jika ia berhubungan intim dengannya setelah melahirkan?

T: Seorang wanita hamil menolak berhubungan intim dengan suaminya yang merasa tersakiti oleh penolakan tersebut, lalu ia bersumpah dengan talak bahwa ia tidak akan berhubungan intim dengannya setelah melahirkan. Apakah talak jatuh jika ia berhubungan intim dengannya setelah melahirkan? Apakah sebab yang melatarbelakangi sumpah tersebut dipertimbangkan?
content_ar: أما the ~“Iddah from the ثانياً الزوج, it is a controversial point among العلماء. إذا the ثانياً الزوج knows that his marriage with her is forbidden, the sound opinion is that there should be an ~“Iddah. إذا he thinks that such marriage is valid, there must be an ~Iddah from him. A man promised his الزوجة to divorce her, but he had the intention to resume marriage with her and conclude a new marriage contract with another dowry, is this valid? Q: A man said to his الزوجة: I do not want you. Go to your الأسرة. I am going to divorce you. He really intended to divorce her. Is it valid to resume marriage with her and conclude a new marriage contract with another dowry? A: The promise to divorce is not effected and it is neither obligatory nor desirable to fulfill it. إذا he really divorced her and by saying “Go to your الأسرة”, he meant divorce, she is حين divorced إلا إذا he intended more. He has the الحق to resume marriage with her خلال her waiting period even without her consent, her custodian or dowry. الله knows best. Is it permissible for a man to divorce his الزوجة just لأن his الأم hates her? Q: A woman hates the الزوجة of her son وإن كان she has given birth to الأولاد. The الزوج’s الأم advises him to divorce her. Is it allowed for him to do لذا? عندما a man thrice divorces his الزوجة unintentionally and he means just حين, is it effected? Q: A man quarreled with his الزوجة and he wanted to divorce her حين, but he erred and he divorced her thrice. What is the legal judgment? A: All praise be to الله. إذا he erred and divorced her thrice بينما he intends just حين, only one divorce is effected. Even إذا he erred and intended to say another word instead of divorce but قال it unintentionally, no divorce is effected. الله knows best. A man is indebted to his الزوجة and he wanted to divorce her إذا he did not pay his debt. إذا she acquitted him from such debt, is divorce effected? Q: A man was indebted to his الزوجة who said to him: I am afraid that you may not pay me back. أجاب: إذا I have not settled such debt by the end of Ramadan, you are thrice divorced. The الزوج is now absent in Qus and he did not appoint an agent to act on behalf of him. إذا the الزوجة acquitted him, is divorce effected? A: إذا she acquitted him, he should not divorce her وفقاً لـ many jurists مثل Abu Hanifah, محمد ﷺ, Ahmed and others. إذا she acquitted him, there is no debt to be settled. The same thing applies عندما a man pays the debt on behalf of another as the lender obtained his المال. النبي ﷺ (ﷺ) said to a woman: “إذا there had been a debt on your الأم (or الأب), would you have paid it? She replied: Yes. النبي ﷺ said: الله’s الحقوق are better fulfilled. Is it permissible for a man to re-marry his exwife whom he divorced thrice قبل consummating marriage with her? Q: Is it permissible for a man to re-marry his virgin exwife -whom he divorced thrice قبل consummating marriage with her? A: All praise be to الله. Divorcing a woman thrice قبل or بعد consummating marriage makes her illegal for the الزوج حتى she married another who, in turn, divorced her. This is the opinion held by the four juristic schools. A woman is divorced thrice قبل consummating marriage and عندما she gets 201 the new الزوجة hated the old one, she has the الحق to divorce her on his behalf. The term of this authorization letter is ten years. Later, he divorced the authorized woman. Is such authorization valid? Will it be invalid لأن the authorized woman is divorced? A: All praise be to الله. Some may think that this question is related to authorization depending on the fact that إذا a الزوج authorized his الزوجة in a sale contract, على سبيل المثال, and later he thrice divorced her, such authorization is not valid as mentioned by jurists. The case here is different. This authorization letter is invalid حين he divorced her, لأن he did not intend to divorce his أولاً الزوجة. The man’s intention was to make the ثانياً الزوجة have full freedom in divorcing the أولاً. He means that إذا the ثانياً الزوجة did not want another الزوجة to live with her الزوج, she has the الحق to divorce her. حين the authorized woman is divorced, she has no الحق to use such authorization letter. The الزوج made such letter just to please his ثانياً الزوجة and now she is thrice divorced. It is now meaningless. أما stipulating certain conditions in the marriage contract مثل not to make polygamy, some العلماء believe that such conditions are valid. إذا the الزوج breached the condition and married another, the الزوجة has the الحق to terminate the contract. This is a more expressive case than our case here in which he authorized the new الزوجة to divorce the old one حين she hated her. In both cases, the authorized woman has the الحق to act وفقاً لـ the contract or letter عندما there is already another الزوجة. وفقاً لـ Abu Hanifah and Shafi*1, such conditions are invalid. The authorization letter is permissible وفقاً لـ the unanimous agreement of مسلم العلماء and the authorizer has the الحق to terminate it. إذا one said to his الزوجة: “You are free to divorce yourself”, this is a controversial point among العلماء. وفقاً لـ Ahmed and Shafi*I, it is just an authorization and the الزوج has the الحق to terminate it قبل she uses it. من ناحية أخرى, وفقاً لـ Abu Hanifah and مالك, the man does not have the الحق to terminate it. وفقاً لـ Ahmed, مالك and other العلماء, إذا the man stipulates that إذا he married another الزوجة, she would have the الحق to be divorced لذا long as she is his الزوجة. حين he divorced her, she does not have any الحق to such stipulation. الله knows best. عندما a man’s authorized agent thrice divorces his (the man’s) الزوجة, is it permissible for the الزوج to return to his الزوجة? Q: A quarrel occurred between a man and his الزوجة. He was about to travel and قال to his agent: إذا she is content with this sum of المال as her expenses, hand it over to her. إذا she is discontent, divorce her. بعد the general permission to get out, يجوز for her to get out. الله knows best. A man accused his الزوجة of stealing a sum of المال and said to her: إذا you did not bring this المال, you are divorced. Is divorce effected? Q: A man accused his الزوجة of stealing a sum of المال. Sقال: I swear by الله that I have not stolen it. قال: إذا you did not bring this المال, you are thrice divorced. What about the status of the الزوجة? A: إذا it turns out that she did not steal the المال, she is not to be divorced وفقاً لـ the soundest opinion held by العلماء. The الزوج means that she is divorced only إذا she had taken the المال. الله knows best. عندما the الزوج says to his الزوجة: “you are divorced إذا you give birth to a female baby”, and he revoked his threat. The woman gave birth to a female baby. Is divorce effected? Q: بينما his الزوجة is pregnant, the الزوج said to her: “you are divorced إذا you give birth to a female baby”. قبل giving birth, he revoked his threat. Later the woman gave birth to a female baby. Is divorce effected? A: إذا he divorced her irrevocably or he left her حتى her “Iddah (waiting period) comes to an end, there are two famous opinions held by العلماء in this regard. الإمام Shafi! أيضاً held two opinions in this regard; one of them is that divorce is effected, and this is the opinion of Ahmed as well. إذا he did not revoke his divorce and returned to her خلال the waiting period, the marriage contract is still valid. Divorce is effected إذا he left the matter pending (i.e. he still stipulates the condition mentioned in the question.) خلال a quarrel with his الزوجة, the الزوج said: إذا you say “divorce me”, I will do, but she kept silent. What is the legal ruling on this matter? Q: A man quarreled with his الزوجة and he was hurt. وبناءً على ذلك, قال: إذا you say “divorce me”, you are thrice divorced, but she kept silent. Then sقال to her الأم: what does he say? Her الأم told her his words. The الزوجة said: Divorce me. Is divorced حين or thrice effected? An angry man swore an oath of thrice divorce that his pregnant الزوجة should not enter her aunt’s house. بعد giving birth, she entered this house. Is divorce effected? Q: An angry man swore an oath of thrice divorce that his pregnant الزوجة should not enter her aunt’s house. بعد giving birth to a baby, she entered this house. The man حين said to other people: إذا my الزوجة entered her aunt’s house بعد giving birth, she is not to be blamed. Is divorce effected? A: إذا the man intends that حين his الزوجة gave birth to a الولد, he is not to be blamed for his oath and that his الزوجة is free to enter her aunt’s house, divorce is not effected. Yet his oath is still effective and إذا his الزوجة entered her aunt’s house بينما she is pregnant, divorce is effected. الله knows best. قبل his travel, a الزوج swore an oath of divorce that his الزوجة should not get out of the house خلال his absence, but out of necessity, she went out. Is divorce effected? 212 Q: قبل his travel, a الزوج said to his الزوجة: إذا you get out of the house خلال my absence, you are divorced. بعد his arrival, sقال to him: There was necessity and I was obliged to get out. Is divorce effected? A: إذا she believes that such necessity is not included in his oath and that she does not act in disconformity with his oath عندما she gets out, divorce is not effected. عندما a pregnant woman refuses to have intercourse with her الزوج and he swore an oath of divorce that he will not have intercourse with her بعد giving birth. What is the legal judgement إذا he had intercourse with her بعد giving birth? Q: A pregnant woman refused to have intercourse with her الزوج who was hurt لأن of such refusal and swore an oath of divorce that he will not have intercourse with her بعد giving birth. Is divorce effected إذا he had intercourse with her بعد giving birth? Is the العقل for such an oath taken into consideration?
